creator: euan@potensol.com
text:
(In reply to Martin Waschbüsch from comment #5)

Great, this all sounds good to me.

If there is no configure flag for activesync (e.g --with-activesync) then a @${REINPLACE_CMD} is what is required. It's not crude at all, very common in ports from what I've seen.

Thanks for this work, I'm looking forward to testing it. I'm just finishing off the patches that cleanup warnings. Should be able to review in next couple of days. But I will need to run the next port revision in production for a few days as well.
